default.tailwind: appearance-none w-full px-3 py-2 text-base border border-slate-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500/50 pr-10

error.tailwind: appearance-none w-full px-3 py-2 text-base border border-red-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500/50 bg-red-50 pr-10

disabled.tailwind: appearance-none w-full px-3 py-2 text-base border border-slate-200 rounded-lg bg-slate-100 text-slate-400 cursor-not-allowed pr-10
